seo.title: GitHub Actions for CI/CD for AI Apps
seo.description: How GitHub Actions fits into real CI/CD for AI Apps workflows.

content.headline: AI Test Validator for CI Pipelines
content.description: Validates AI feature tests in CI pipelines by checking for deterministic output patterns and test stability

inputs.name: test_script
inputs.label: AI Test Script
inputs.placeholder: Paste your AI test code here

input.test_script: def test_llm_response(): assert 'error' not in generate_text()

content.how_it_works: Analyzes AI test scripts by executing them multiple times, measuring output consistency, and comparing against stability thresholds. Identifies flaky tests caused by non-deterministic LLM behavior while allowing configurable flexibility for acceptable variation.
